Species - Human.name: Species - Human
Species - Human.description: Versatile and ambitious sentients who dominate the galaxy through adaptability, sheer numbers, and endless drive.

Species - Human Clone (of Jango Fett).name: Species - Human Clone (of Jango Fett)
Species - Human Clone (of Jango Fett).description: Genetically engineered soldiers grown on Kamino, possessing identical features, exceptional training, and rapid aging.

Species - Chiss.name: Species - Chiss
Species - Chiss.description: Highly analytical and blue-skinned near-humans from the Unknown Regions, known for their tactical brilliance, discipline, and secrecy.

Species - Mirialan.name: Species - Mirialan
Species - Mirialan.description: Deeply spiritual green-skinned near-humans, recognized by geometric facial tattoos representing personal achievements and destiny.

Species - Zabrak.name: Species - Zabrak
Species - Zabrak.description: Strong-willed near-humans from Iridonia, sporting a crown of vestigial horns and distinctive facial tattoos, known for their resilience.

Species - Pantoran.name: Species - Pantoran
Species - Pantoran.description: Blue-skinned near-humans from Pantora, valued for their strong diplomatic traditions and distinct yellow facial paint representing lineage.

Species - Togruta.name: Species - Togruta
Species - Togruta.description: Colorful sentients with curved montrals and lekku, possessing natural echolocation and a deeply communal, pack-oriented culture.

Species - Twi'lek.name: Species - Twi'lek
Species - Twi'lek.description: Elegant sentients with twin head-tails (lekku), known for their grace, non-verbal communication, and resilience on Ryloth.

Species - Dathomirian.name: Species - Dathomirian
Species - Dathomirian.description: Pale near-humans from Dathomir, whose society is defined by the magick-wielding Nightsisters and martial Nightbrothers.

Species - Wookiee.name: Species - Wookiee
Species - Wookiee.description: Towering, fur-covered sentients from Kashyyyk, renowned for their incredible strength, fierce loyalty, and honor-bound life debts.

Species - Rodian.name: Species - Rodian
Species - Rodian.description: Reptilian sentients with large multifaceted eyes and snout-like mouths, hailing from a hunt-centric culture on swampy Rodia.

Species - Trandoshan.name: Species - Trandoshan
Species - Trandoshan.description: Large, reptilian sentients from Dosha, dedicated to the Scorekeeper goddess, known for their regeneration and passion for the hunt.

Species - Mon Calamari.name: Species - Mon Calamari
Species - Mon Calamari.description: Amphibious sentients from Dac, highly advanced in technology and art, recognized for their organic-style starships.

Species - Quarren.name: Species - Quarren
Species - Quarren.description: Squid-like amphibious sentients from Dac, sharing their homeworld with the Mon Calamari, known for their pragmatic, isolationist views.

Species - Bothan.name: Species - Bothan
Species - Bothan.description: Feline-canine humanoids from Bothawui, famed throughout the galaxy for their intricate spying networks and political maneuvering.

Species - Hutt.name: Species - Hutt
Species - Hutt.description: Gargantuan, slug-like sentients from Nal Hutta, renowned for their immense lifespans, cunning minds, and powerful criminal empires.

Species - Jawa.name: Species - Jawa
Species - Jawa.description: Diminutive, cloak-wearing scavengers from Tatooine, recognized by glowing yellow eyes and a keen talent for repairing junk.

Species - Tusken Raider.name: Species - Tusken Raider
Species - Tusken Raider.description: Nomadic, heavily wrapped desert-dwellers from Tatooine, fiercely territorial and protective of their sacred ancestral oases.

Species - Gamorrean.name: Species - Gamorrean
Species - Gamorrean.description: Stocky, pig-like sentients from Gamorr, highly valued across the galaxy as loyal, brute-force bodyguards and mercenaries.

Species - Ithorian.name: Species - Ithorian
Species - Ithorian.description: Gentle, hammer-headed sentients with two mouths, deeply devoted to preserving nature, ecology, and peaceful coexistence.

Species - Duros.name: Species - Duros
Species - Duros.description: Blue-skinned, red-eyed near-humans who were among the galaxy's earliest spacefarers, renowned as expert starship pilots and navigators.

Species - Sullustan.name: Species - Sullustan
Species - Sullustan.description: Jowled, subterranean sentients from Sullust, known for their incredible sense of direction and excellence in piloting and engineering.

Species - Gungan.name: Species - Gungan
Species - Gungan.description: Amphibious, long-eared sentients from Naboo, living in bubble cities and wielding unique plasma-based technology.

Species - Neimoidian.name: Species - Neimoidian
Species - Neimoidian.description: Pragmatic, green-skinned humanoids closely related to the Duros, known for their mercantile dominance and bureaucratic caution.

Species - Kaminoan.name: Species - Kaminoan
Species - Kaminoan.description: Elegant, long-necked cloners from Kamino, known for their cold scientific precision and genetic engineering mastery.

Species - Geonosian.name: Species - Geonosian
Species - Geonosian.description: Winged, insectoid sentients from Geonosis, living in towering hives and possessing a highly rigid, caste-based society.

Species - Kel Dor.name: Species - Kel Dor
Species - Kel Dor.description: Sentients from Dorin who must wear specialized breath masks in oxygen-rich atmospheres, known for their strong sense of justice.

Species - Nautolan.name: Species - Nautolan
Species - Nautolan.description: Amphibious green sentients from Glee Anselm, sporting a crown of sensory tentacles that can read emotions via pheromones.

Species - Toydarian.name: Species - Toydarian
Species - Toydarian.description: Stubborn, winged sentients from Toydaria, completely immune to Force mind tricks due to their unique brain chemistry.

Species - Lasat.name: Species - Lasat
Species - Lasat.description: Tall, powerful sentients from Lira San, possessing remarkable agility, prehensile toes, and a fierce warrior tradition.

Species - Chagrian.name: Species - Chagrian
Species - Chagrian.description: Horned, blue-skinned sentients from Champala, known for their discipline, legal expertise, and distinguished governmental service.

Species - Devaronian.name: Species - Devaronian
Species - Devaronian.description: Sentients from Devaron; males are horned and wanderlust-driven, while females are hornless and dominate local politics and industry.

Species - Weequay.name: Species - Weequay
Species - Weequay.description: Leathery-skinned sentients from Sriluur, who communicate silently via pheromones and are highly prized as mercenaries and pirates.

Species - Nikto.name: Species - Nikto
Species - Nikto.description: Reptilian sentients from Kintan, divided into multiple sub-species, historically bound in servitude to the Hutt Cartels.

Species - Klatooinian.name: Species - Klatooinian
Species - Klatooinian.description: Dog-faced, leathery-skinned sentients from Klatooine, renowned for their deep respect for age, tradition, and treaty law.

Species - Aqualish.name: Species - Aqualish
Species - Aqualish.description: Walrus-faced sentients from Ando, divided into sub-species, known for their gruff demeanor and aggressive survival instincts.

Species - Protocol Droid.name: Species - Protocol Droid
Species - Protocol Droid.description: Advanced human-cyborg relations droids designed to facilitate communication, translation, and diplomatic etiquette.

Species - Astromech Droid.name: Species - Astromech Droid
Species - Astromech Droid.description: Highly versatile utility droids built for starship repair, computer slicing, and hyperspace navigation calculation.

Species - Research Droid.name: Species - Research Droid
Species - Research Droid.description: Droids equipped with specialized scanners, databases, and analytical tools for scientific exploration and data archival.

Species - Medical Droid.name: Species - Medical Droid
Species - Medical Droid.description: Droids programmed with extensive anatomical databases, surgical skills, and pharmaceutical knowledge to heal sentients.

Species - Combat Droid.name: Species - Combat Droid
Species - Combat Droid.description: Droids built specifically for warfare, equipped with heavy armor plating, weapon systems, and targeting algorithms.

Species - Labor Droid.name: Species - Labor Droid
Species - Labor Droid.description: Heavy-duty droids designed for raw physical labor, industrial construction, cargo hauling, and hazardous environments.

Species - Assassin Droid.name: Species - Assassin Droid
Species - Assassin Droid.description: Lethal, independent-minded droids programmed for tracking, stealth, infiltration, and the silent elimination of targets.

Obligation - Addiction.name: Obligation - Addiction
Obligation - Addiction.description: The character is physically or psychologically dependent on a substance, activity, or vice, demanding regular attention.

Obligation - Betrayal.name: Obligation - Betrayal
Obligation - Betrayal.description: The character has either been deeply betrayed by someone they trusted, or is hiding their own past acts of treachery.

Obligation - Blackmail.name: Obligation - Blackmail
Obligation - Blackmail.description: Someone knows a dark, damaging secret about the character and uses it to extort money, favors, or compliance.

Obligation - Bounty.name: Obligation - Bounty
Obligation - Bounty.description: There is a price on the character's head, attracting active pursuit from bounty hunters and law enforcement across the galaxy.

Obligation - Criminal Record.name: Obligation - Criminal Record
Obligation - Criminal Record.description: The character is wanted by regional or galactic authorities for past crimes, making travel and open business dangerous.

Obligation - Debt.name: Obligation - Debt
Obligation - Debt.description: The character owes a massive sum of credits to a powerful lender, cartel, or syndicate, requiring regular payments.

Obligation - Dutybound.name: Obligation - Dutybound
Obligation - Dutybound.description: The character feels a deep, unshakeable moral or professional obligation to an organization, creed, or specific individual.

Obligation - Family.name: Obligation - Family
Obligation - Family.description: The character has family members they must support, protect, or hide, presenting a constant vulnerability.

Obligation - Favor.name: Obligation - Favor
Obligation - Favor.description: The character owes a massive, open-ended favor to a powerful figure, who could call in the debt at any moment.

Obligation - Oath.name: Obligation - Oath
Obligation - Oath.description: The character has sworn a sacred vow or code of honor that dictates their behavior and restricts their choices.

Obligation - Obsession.name: Obligation - Obsession
Obligation - Obsession.description: The character is consumed by a single-minded pursuit, whether it is a rare artifact, a person, or a grand mystery.

Obligation - Responsibility.name: Obligation - Responsibility
Obligation - Responsibility.description: The character carries the burden of caring for a group, a vessel, or a localized population, prioritizing them above all.

Career - Bounty Hunter.name: Career - Bounty Hunter
Career - Bounty Hunter.description: A professional tracker who hunts down targets for credits, utilizing survival skills, gear, and combat training.

Career - Colonist.name: Career - Colonist
Career - Colonist.description: A pioneer building a life on the galactic frontier, skilled in civilian pursuits like medicine, trade, and leadership.

Career - Explorer.name: Career - Explorer
Career - Explorer.description: A trailblazer who charts the unknown hyperlanes and survives the harshest wilderness of the galaxy.

Career - Hired Gun.name: Career - Hired Gun
Career - Hired Gun.description: A combat specialist providing muscle, defense, or heavy firepower to whoever has the credits to pay.

Career - Smuggler.name: Career - Smuggler
Career - Smuggler.description: A rogue operating outside the law, moving illegal cargo, evading blockades, and relying on wit and charm.

Career - Technician.name: Career - Technician
Career - Technician.description: An expert in machines and electronics, keeping starships running and slicing security systems with ease.

Career - Ace.name: Career - Ace
Career - Ace.description: A highly skilled pilot and vehicle operator who feels most at home in the cockpit of a starfighter or speeder.

Career - Commander.name: Career - Commander
Career - Commander.description: A military leader and strategist trained to coordinate troops, manage logistics, and win battles.

Career - Diplomat.name: Career - Diplomat
Career - Diplomat.description: A representative skilled in negotiation, mediation, and advocacy, resolving conflicts with words.

Career - Engineer.name: Career - Engineer
Career - Engineer.description: A technical specialist who designs, builds, and occasionally demolishes structures, vehicles, and weapons.

Career - Soldier.name: Career - Soldier
Career - Soldier.description: A dedicated combat professional trained in front-line warfare, squad tactics, and weapon operations.

Career - Spy.name: Career - Spy
Career - Spy.description: A covert operative specializing in intelligence gathering, infiltration, sabotage, and information warfare.

Career - Consular.name: Career - Consular
Career - Consular.description: A Force-user dedicated to diplomacy, healing, and seeking a deeper, peaceful understanding of the Force.

Career - Guardian.name: Career - Guardian
Career - Guardian.description: A Force-user who stands as a protector of the weak, defending justice and fighting against tyranny.

Career - Mystic.name: Career - Mystic
Career - Mystic.description: A Force-user deeply in tune with the cosmic Force, uncovering secrets and guiding others through visions.

Career - Seeker.name: Career - Seeker
Career - Seeker.description: A Force-user who travels the wild edges of the galaxy, hunting dark side threats and following the Force's will.

Career - Sentinel.name: Career - Sentinel
Career - Sentinel.description: A Force-user operating in urban shadows, blending stealth, slicing, and street-level justice.

Career - Warrior.name: Career - Warrior
Career - Warrior.description: A Force-user focused on martial perfection, lightsaber combat, and offensive applications of the Force.

Bounty Hunter - Assassin (Specialism).name: Bounty Hunter - Assassin (Specialism)
Bounty Hunter - Assassin (Specialism).description: A lethal specialist focusing on stealth, sniping, and quick kills.

Bounty Hunter - Gadgeteer (Specialism).name: Bounty Hunter - Gadgeteer (Specialism)
Bounty Hunter - Gadgeteer (Specialism).description: A tech-savvy hunter who uses customized armor and high-tech weaponry.

Bounty Hunter - Survivalist (Specialism).name: Bounty Hunter - Survivalist (Specialism)
Bounty Hunter - Survivalist (Specialism).description: A rugged tracker skilled at surviving in harsh wilderness and tracking prey.

Bounty Hunter - Martial Artist (Speciali.name: Bounty Hunter - Martial Artist (Specialism)
Bounty Hunter - Martial Artist (Speciali.description: A close-quarters specialist who uses hand-to-hand combat and pressure points.

Bounty Hunter - Operator (Specialism).name: Bounty Hunter - Operator (Specialism)
Bounty Hunter - Operator (Specialism).description: A vehicle-focused bounty hunter skilled in pursuit and piloting.

Bounty Hunter - Skip Tracer (Specialism).name: Bounty Hunter - Skip Tracer (Specialism)
Bounty Hunter - Skip Tracer (Specialism).description: A detective who tracks down debtors and targets in urban settings.

Colonist - Doctor (Specialism).name: Colonist - Doctor (Specialism)
Colonist - Doctor (Specialism).description: A medical professional skilled in treating injuries, curing diseases, and saving lives in the field.

Colonist - Politico (Specialism).name: Colonist - Politico (Specialism)
Colonist - Politico (Specialism).description: A charismatic speaker and politician who influences others through rhetoric and social pressure.

Colonist - Scholar (Specialism).name: Colonist - Scholar (Specialism)
Colonist - Scholar (Specialism).description: An academic dedicated to research, data analysis, and broad historical or scientific lore.

Colonist - Entrepreneur (Specialism).name: Colonist - Entrepreneur (Specialism)
Colonist - Entrepreneur (Specialism).description: A savvy business mind who manages investments, deals in commerce, and maximizes credit flow.

Colonist - Marshal (Specialism).name: Colonist - Marshal (Specialism)
Colonist - Marshal (Specialism).description: A law enforcer on the frontier, dedicated to keeping the peace and bringing outlaws to justice.

Colonist - Performer (Specialism).name: Colonist - Performer (Specialism)
Colonist - Performer (Specialism).description: A talented entertainer who draws attention, distracts crowds, and raises morale through art.

Explorer - Fringer (Specialism).name: Explorer - Fringer (Specialism)
Explorer - Fringer (Specialism).description: A wanderer of the outer rim, skilled in finding safe paths and negotiating at remote outposts.

Explorer - Scout (Specialism).name: Explorer - Scout (Specialism)
Explorer - Scout (Specialism).description: A pathfinder who surveys planets, maps terrain, and warns the party of upcoming natural threats.

Explorer - Trader (Specialism).name: Explorer - Trader (Specialism)
Explorer - Trader (Specialism).description: A merchant voyager who buys low, sells high, and manages the logistics of interstellar trade.

Explorer - Archaeologist (Specialism).name: Explorer - Archaeologist (Specialism)
Explorer - Archaeologist (Specialism).description: A researcher of ancient ruins and lost civilizations, uncovering secrets from the galactic past.

Explorer - Big-Game Hunter (Specialism).name: Explorer - Big-Game Hunter (Specialism)
Explorer - Big-Game Hunter (Specialism).description: A tracker of massive beasts, specializing in survival, trapping, and high-caliber weapons.

Explorer - Driver (Specialism).name: Explorer - Driver (Specialism)
Explorer - Driver (Specialism).description: A master of planetary vehicles, driving speeders, tanks, and walkers through impossible terrain.

Hired Gun - Bodyguard (Specialism).name: Hired Gun - Bodyguard (Specialism)
Hired Gun - Bodyguard (Specialism).description: A defender who shields allies from harm and acts as a bullet-catcher in dangerous situations.

Hired Gun - Marauder (Specialism).name: Hired Gun - Marauder (Specialism)
Hired Gun - Marauder (Specialism).description: A brutal melee fighter who unleashes raw fury with axes, vibroblades, and close-range weapons.

Hired Gun - Mercenary Soldier (Specialis.name: Hired Gun - Mercenary Soldier (Specialism)
Hired Gun - Mercenary Soldier (Specialis.description: A tactical professional skilled in squad combat, disciplined firing lines, and battlefield maneuvers.

Hired Gun - Enforcer (Specialism).name: Hired Gun - Enforcer (Specialism)
Hired Gun - Enforcer (Specialism).description: A street-level thug who intimidates rivals and uses brute force to maintain order.

Hired Gun - Demolitionist (Specialism).name: Hired Gun - Demolitionist (Specialism)
Hired Gun - Demolitionist (Specialism).description: An explosives expert skilled in setting charges, breaching doors, and controlled destruction.

Hired Gun - Heavy (Specialism).name: Hired Gun - Heavy (Specialism)
Hired Gun - Heavy (Specialism).description: A gunner specializing in laying down suppressive fire with heavy repeaters and launchers.

Smuggler - Pilot (Specialism).name: Smuggler - Pilot (Specialism)
Smuggler - Pilot (Specialism).description: A master of starship flight, capable of dodging asteroids, imperial blockades, and dogfighters.

Smuggler - Scoundrel (Specialism).name: Smuggler - Scoundrel (Specialism)
Smuggler - Scoundrel (Specialism).description: A charming rogue who relies on luck, fast-talk, and dirty fighting to survive tight spots.

Smuggler - Thief (Specialism).name: Smuggler - Thief (Specialism)
Smuggler - Thief (Specialism).description: A stealthy operator skilled in pickpocketing, security bypassing, and silent thievery.

Smuggler - Charmer (Specialism).name: Smuggler - Charmer (Specialism)
Smuggler - Charmer (Specialism).description: A smooth talker who uses charm, elegance, and seduction to disarm potential threats.

Smuggler - Gambler (Specialism).name: Smuggler - Gambler (Specialism)
Smuggler - Gambler (Specialism).description: A high-stakes player who calculates odds, bluffs opponents, and makes fortune work for them.

Smuggler - Gunslinger (Specialism).name: Smuggler - Gunslinger (Specialism)
Smuggler - Gunslinger (Specialism).description: A rapid-draw duelist who wields dual blasters with blinding speed and accuracy.

Technician - Mechanic (Specialism).name: Technician - Mechanic (Specialism)
Technician - Mechanic (Specialism).description: A repair expert who keeps starships, speeders, and equipment running under extreme pressure.

Technician - Outlaw Tech (Specialism).name: Technician - Outlaw Tech (Specialism)
Technician - Outlaw Tech (Specialism).description: A creative modder who bypasses safety protocols to supercharge weapons and shields illegally.

Technician - Slicer (Specialism).name: Technician - Slicer (Specialism)
Technician - Slicer (Specialism).description: A master computer hacker who infiltrates networks, rewrites code, and disables security systems.

Technician - Cyber Tech (Specialism).name: Technician - Cyber Tech (Specialism)
Technician - Cyber Tech (Specialism).description: A specialist in biomechanical upgrades, installing cybernetic limbs and enhancements.

Technician - Droid Tech (Specialism).name: Technician - Droid Tech (Specialism)
Technician - Droid Tech (Specialism).description: An engineer dedicated to building, reprogramming, and repairing all models of droids.

Technician - Modder (Specialism).name: Technician - Modder (Specialism)
Technician - Modder (Specialism).description: A hands-on tinkerer who customizes gear, weapons, and tools to maximize their efficiency.

Ace - Rigger (Specialism).name: Ace - Rigger (Specialism)
Ace - Rigger (Specialism).description: A vehicle customizer who upgrades their personal ship or speeder into a customized masterpiece.

Ace - Hotshot (Specialism).name: Ace - Hotshot (Specialism)
Ace - Hotshot (Specialism).description: A daring pilot who flies with reckless abandon, pulling off spectacular, death-defying maneuvers.

Ace - Beast Rider (Specialism).name: Ace - Beast Rider (Specialism)
Ace - Beast Rider (Specialism).description: A rider who bonds with and controls alien creatures as mounts or companions in battle.

Commander - Commodore (Specialism).name: Commander - Commodore (Specialism)
Commander - Commodore (Specialism).description: A naval officer who coordinates capital ship fleets and excels in large-scale space warfare.

Commander - Squadron Leader (Specialism).name: Commander - Squadron Leader (Specialism)
Commander - Squadron Leader (Specialism).description: A tactical flight commander who coordinates starfighter wings for maximum effectiveness.

Commander - Strategist (Specialism).name: Commander - Strategist (Specialism)
Commander - Strategist (Specialism).description: A high-level planner who coordinates theater-wide operations and outmaneuvers enemy armies.

Commander - Tactician (Specialism).name: Commander - Tactician (Specialism)
Commander - Tactician (Specialism).description: A ground-combat leader who reads the battlefield and directs squad maneuvers in real-time.

Commander - Figurehead (Specialism).name: Commander - Figurehead (Specialism)
Commander - Figurehead (Specialism).description: A symbolic leader whose presence inspires absolute loyalty and rallies troops to victory.

Commander - Instructor (Specialism).name: Commander - Instructor (Specialism)
Commander - Instructor (Specialism).description: A drill sergeant and mentor who trains recruits, maximizing the potential of their comrades.

Diplomat - Ambassador (Specialism).name: Diplomat - Ambassador (Specialism)
Diplomat - Ambassador (Specialism).description: A formal representative who negotiates treaties, handles statecraft, and manages high-level alliances.

Diplomat - Agitator (Specialism).name: Diplomat - Agitator (Specialism)
Diplomat - Agitator (Specialism).description: A revolutionary speaker who rouses crowds, sparks rebellions, and undermines existing authority.

Diplomat - Quartermaster (Specialism).name: Diplomat - Quartermaster (Specialism)
Diplomat - Quartermaster (Specialism).description: A supply officer who manages resources, secures gear, and handles the logistics of rebellion.

Diplomat - Advocate (Specialism).name: Diplomat - Advocate (Specialism)
Diplomat - Advocate (Specialism).description: A legal expert who negotiates contracts, defends clients, and uses laws to get results.

Diplomat - Propagandist (Specialism).name: Diplomat - Propagandist (Specialism)
Diplomat - Propagandist (Specialism).description: A media specialist who shapes public perception, spreads messages, and counters enemy spin.

Diplomat - Analyst (Specialism).name: Diplomat - Analyst (Specialism)
Diplomat - Analyst (Specialism).description: An intelligence examiner who processes data, decodes signals, and uncovers enemy patterns.

Engineer - Saboteur (Specialism).name: Engineer - Saboteur (Specialism)
Engineer - Saboteur (Specialism).description: A demolitionist covertly targeting enemy infrastructure, supply lines, and bases.

Engineer - Scientist (Specialism).name: Engineer - Scientist (Specialism)
Engineer - Scientist (Specialism).description: A researcher exploring physical laws, developing new materials, and inventing technologies.

Engineer - Droid Specialist (Specialism).name: Engineer - Droid Specialist (Specialism)
Engineer - Droid Specialist (Specialism).description: A designer who programs, repairs, and optimizes droids for scientific or military utility.

Engineer - Shipwright (Specialism).name: Engineer - Shipwright (Specialism)
Engineer - Shipwright (Specialism).description: A starship designer and structural engineer skilled in shipyard construction and repairs.

Engineer - Artillerist (Specialism).name: Engineer - Artillerist (Specialism)
Engineer - Artillerist (Specialism).description: A specialist in heavy turrets, vehicle weapons, and bombardment fire support.

Soldier - Commando (Specialism).name: Soldier - Commando (Specialism)
Soldier - Commando (Specialism).description: A special forces soldier skilled in stealth, jungle/desert survival, and lethal strikes.

Soldier - Medic (Specialism).name: Soldier - Medic (Specialism)
Soldier - Medic (Specialism).description: A combat first-responder trained to patch up wounded troops in the middle of active firefights.

Soldier - Sharpshooter (Specialism).name: Soldier - Sharpshooter (Specialism)
Soldier - Sharpshooter (Specialism).description: A long-range marksman who eliminates high-value targets from concealment.

Soldier - Vanguard (Specialism).name: Soldier - Vanguard (Specialism)
Soldier - Vanguard (Specialism).description: A front-line shock trooper who breaches enemy lines and absorbs the initial assault.

Soldier - Trailblazer (Specialism).name: Soldier - Trailblazer (Specialism)
Soldier - Trailblazer (Specialism).description: A scout trooper who pathfinds wild battlefields and establishes forward observation posts.

Spy - Infiltrator (Specialism).name: Spy - Infiltrator (Specialism)
Spy - Infiltrator (Specialism).description: A stealth operative skilled in slipping past guards, disguise, and silent close-quarters combat.

Spy - Interrogator (Specialism).name: Spy - Interrogator (Specialism)
Spy - Interrogator (Specialism).description: An examiner who extracts information from captives through psychological and physical pressure.

Spy - Sleeper Agent (Specialism).name: Spy - Sleeper Agent (Specialism)
Spy - Sleeper Agent (Specialism).description: An operative who blends into target societies for months or years, awaiting activation.

Spy - Courier (Specialism).name: Spy - Courier (Specialism)
Spy - Courier (Specialism).description: A high-risk messenger skilled in smuggling critical data and documents across imperial lines.

Consular - Healer (Specialism).name: Consular - Healer (Specialism)
Consular - Healer (Specialism).description: A Force-user dedicated to curing injuries, cleansing poison, and restoring vitality through the Force.

Consular - Niman Disciple (Specialism).name: Consular - Niman Disciple (Specialism)
Consular - Niman Disciple (Specialism).description: A practitioner of lightsaber Form VI, balancing physical blade work with offensive Force powers.

Consular - Sage (Specialism).name: Consular - Sage (Specialism)
Consular - Sage (Specialism).description: A scholar who seeks ancient secrets, interprets prophecies, and guides others with deep wisdom.

Consular - Arbiter (Specialism).name: Consular - Arbiter (Specialism)
Consular - Arbiter (Specialism).description: A legal mediator who uses Force intuition to resolve disputes and broker peace.

Consular - Ascetic (Specialism).name: Consular - Ascetic (Specialism)
Consular - Ascetic (Specialism).description: A monk who shuns material comfort, mastering internal discipline and physical endurance.

Consular - Teacher (Specialism).name: Consular - Teacher (Specialism)
Consular - Teacher (Specialism).description: An instructor who guides apprentices, passing down the history and philosophy of the Force.

Guardian - Peacekeeper (Specialism).name: Guardian - Peacekeeper (Specialism)
Guardian - Peacekeeper (Specialism).description: A law enforcer who patrols troubled regions, keeping order and defending communities.

Guardian - Protector (Specialism).name: Guardian - Protector (Specialism)
Guardian - Protector (Specialism).description: A defender who shields allies from danger and stands as an unbreakable wall against threats.

Guardian - Soresu Defender (Specialism).name: Guardian - Soresu Defender (Specialism)
Guardian - Soresu Defender (Specialism).description: A master of lightsaber Form III, focusing on perfect defense and parrying blaster fire.

Guardian - Armorer (Specialism).name: Guardian - Armorer (Specialism)
Guardian - Armorer (Specialism).description: A blacksmith who crafts, tempers, and infuses defensive armor and gear with the Force.

Guardian - Warden (Specialism).name: Guardian - Warden (Specialism)
Guardian - Warden (Specialism).description: A sentinel who guards sacred temple sites and holds the line against dark side corruption.

Guardian - Warleader (Specialism).name: Guardian - Warleader (Specialism)
Guardian - Warleader (Specialism).description: A combat commander who inspires allies and coordinates front-line tactical defenses.

Mystic - Advisor (Specialism).name: Mystic - Advisor (Specialism)
Mystic - Advisor (Specialism).description: A counselor who uses Force intuition to guide leaders and expose deception.

Mystic - Makashi Duelist (Specialism).name: Mystic - Makashi Duelist (Specialism)
Mystic - Makashi Duelist (Specialism).description: A master of lightsaber Form II, specializing in elegant, precise, one-on-one dueling.

Mystic - Seer (Specialism).name: Mystic - Seer (Specialism)
Mystic - Seer (Specialism).description: A prophet who peers into the streams of time, receiving visions of the future and the past.

Mystic - Alchemist (Specialism).name: Mystic - Alchemist (Specialism)
Mystic - Alchemist (Specialism).description: A researcher who infuses materials, chemicals, and potions with Force energy.

Mystic - Magus (Specialism).name: Mystic - Magus (Specialism)
Mystic - Magus (Specialism).description: A practitioner of esoteric Force rites, manipulating energy and environmental elements.

Mystic - Prophet (Specialism).name: Mystic - Prophet (Specialism)
Mystic - Prophet (Specialism).description: A voice of the Force who inspires crowds and speaks ancient truths to challenge tyrants.

Seeker - Ataru Striker (Specialism).name: Seeker - Ataru Striker (Specialism)
Seeker - Ataru Striker (Specialism).description: A highly acrobatic lightsaber Form IV duelist, utilizing leaps, flips, and fast attacks.

Seeker - Hunter (Specialism).name: Seeker - Hunter (Specialism)
Seeker - Hunter (Specialism).description: A rugged tracker who hunts dangerous beasts and dark side entities across wild worlds.

Seeker - Pathfinder (Specialism).name: Seeker - Pathfinder (Specialism)
Seeker - Pathfinder (Specialism).description: A survivalist who guides travelers through unexplored planetary wilderness and hazards.

Seeker - Executioner (Specialism).name: Seeker - Executioner (Specialism)
Seeker - Executioner (Specialism).description: A lethal tracker tasked with hunting down and eliminating designated enemies of the Force.

Seeker - Hermit (Specialism).name: Seeker - Hermit (Specialism)
Seeker - Hermit (Specialism).description: A solitary survivalist who lives off the land and communicates with alien beasts.

Seeker - Navigator (Specialism).name: Seeker - Navigator (Specialism)
Seeker - Navigator (Specialism).description: A spacefarer who uses the Force to navigate through uncharted hyperlanes and space hazards.

Sentinel - Artisan (Specialism).name: Sentinel - Artisan (Specialism)
Sentinel - Artisan (Specialism).description: A creator who fuses technology and craftsmanship with the guiding energy of the Force.

Sentinel - Shadow (Specialism).name: Sentinel - Shadow (Specialism)
Sentinel - Shadow (Specialism).description: A covert agent who hunts down dark side artifacts and operatives from the cover of darkness.

Sentinel - Shien Expert (Specialism).name: Sentinel - Shien Expert (Specialism)
Sentinel - Shien Expert (Specialism).description: A master of lightsaber Form V, specializing in deflecting blaster bolts back at attackers.

Sentinel - Investigator (Specialism).name: Sentinel - Investigator (Specialism)
Sentinel - Investigator (Specialism).description: A detective who uses keen observation and Force intuition to solve crimes in urban sprawls.

Sentinel - Racer (Specialism).name: Sentinel - Racer (Specialism)
Sentinel - Racer (Specialism).description: A speed enthusiast who uses Force reflexes to pilot swoops and pods at lethal velocities.

Sentinel - Sentry (Specialism).name: Sentinel - Sentry (Specialism)
Sentinel - Sentry (Specialism).description: An urban guardian who keeps watch over city neighborhoods and protects the downtrodden.

Warrior - Aggressor (Specialism).name: Warrior - Aggressor (Specialism)
Warrior - Aggressor (Specialism).description: A terrifying combatant who uses fear, intimidation, and brutal strikes to break the enemy's will.

Warrior - Shii-Cho Knight (Specialism).name: Warrior - Shii-Cho Knight (Specialism)
Warrior - Shii-Cho Knight (Specialism).description: A practitioner of lightsaber Form I, focusing on fighting multiple enemies and sweeping strikes.

Warrior - Starfighter Ace (Specialism).name: Warrior - Starfighter Ace (Specialism)
Warrior - Starfighter Ace (Specialism).description: A pilot who merges their consciousness with their ship, performing impossible flight feats.

Warrior - Colossus (Specialism).name: Warrior - Colossus (Specialism)
Warrior - Colossus (Specialism).description: An imposing fighter of incredible endurance, capable of shrugging off wounds that would kill others.

Warrior - Juyo Berserker (Specialism).name: Warrior - Juyo Berserker (Specialism)
Warrior - Juyo Berserker (Specialism).description: A master of lightsaber Form VII, channeling inner passion into wild, unpredictable strikes.

Warrior - Steel Hand Adept (Specialism).name: Warrior - Steel Hand Adept (Specialism)
Warrior - Steel Hand Adept (Specialism).description: A martial artist who infuses their unarmed strikes and physical body with Force energy.

Force Sensitivity - None.name: Force Sensitivity - None
Force Sensitivity - None.description: The character has no connection to the Force and cannot sense or manipulate its energies.

Force Sensitivity - Low.name: Force Sensitivity - Low
Force Sensitivity - Low.description: An almost imperceptible connection. No amount of training could make the character a Jedi or other Force user, but they occasionally have gut feelings or premonitions that prove to be right, or just seem like a somewhat 'lucky' person.

Force Sensitivity - Medium.name: Force Sensitivity - Medium
Force Sensitivity - Medium.description: A noticeable connection. With training, the character can attain the level of a Novice Force practitioner.

Force Sensitivity - High.name: Force Sensitivity - High
Force Sensitivity - High.description: A strong, pronounced connection. With training, the character can attain the level of a Jedi Knight or powerful Force practitioner.

Force Sensitivity - Abnormally High.name: Force Sensitivity - Abnormally High
Force Sensitivity - Abnormally High.description: An exceptionally rare and intense connection. With training, the character can attain the level of a Grand Master.
